widgets_values:
=== MODELS USED IN THIS WORKFLOW ===

This workflow now uses LTX-2.3 for the main video/audio generation, plus optional enhancement, frame interpolation, depth, and upscale models.

1) LTX-2.3 main video model / UNet

Current node filename:
ltx23FP4_ltx23OfficialDev.safetensors

Recommended LTX-2.3 GGUF source:
https://huggingface.co/unsloth/LTX-2.3-GGUF/tree/main

Note:
Choose one LTX-2.3 GGUF whose file size is the same as, or less than, your available VRAM. For example, if you have 12 GB VRAM, pick a GGUF around 12 GB or smaller. Bigger quantizations usually improve quality but need more VRAM.

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/unet/
(or ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/ / ComfyUI/models/gguf/ if your loader expects it there)

--------------------------------

2) LTX-2.3 distilled LoRA

Filename:
ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors

Download:
https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/loras/

--------------------------------

3) LTX-2 IC LoRA Detailer

Filename:
ltx-2-19b-ic-lora-detailer.safetensors

Download:
https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2-19b-IC-LoRA-Detailer/tree/main

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/loras/

--------------------------------

4) LTX-2.3 inpaint LoRA

Filename:
ltx23_inpaint_rank128_v1.safetensors

Download/source:
Use the LTX-2.3 ComfyUI model pack or the source where you originally downloaded this LoRA.

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/loras/

--------------------------------

5) LTX-2.3 text encoder - Gemma 3 12B

Current node filename:
gemma312bQatAbliterated_gemma312BNVFP4HF.safetensors

If replacing it, use a compatible LTX-2.3 Gemma 3 12B text encoder that fits your VRAM.

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/

--------------------------------

6) LTX-2.3 text projection

Filename:
ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors

Download/source:
Use the LTX-2.3 ComfyUI model pack or the source bundled with your LTX-2.3 text encoder setup.

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/

--------------------------------

7) LTX-2.3 video VAE

Filename:
LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors

Download:
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/vae/

--------------------------------

8) LTX-2.3 audio VAE

Filename:
LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors

Download:
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/vae

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/vae/

--------------------------------

9) LTX-2.3 latent/spatial upscaler

Filename:
ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors

Download:
https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/blob/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/latent_upscale_models/

--------------------------------

10) Upscaler model - ClearReality

Filename:
4x-ClearRealityV1.pth

Download:
https://huggingface.co/skbhadra/ClearRealityV1/resolve/main/4x-ClearRealityV1.pth?download=true

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/upscale_models/

--------------------------------

11) RIFE frame interpolation model

Filename:
rife49.pth

Download:
https://huggingface.co/Isi99999/Frame_Interpolation_Models/resolve/main/rife49.pth?download=true

Place in:
ComfyUI/custom_nodes/ComfyUI-Frame-Interpolation/ckpts/rife/

--------------------------------

12) Depth Anything V2 model

Filename:
depth_anything_v2_vitl_fp16.safetensors

Download:
https://huggingface.co/Kijai/DepthAnythingV2-safetensors/resolve/main/depth_anything_v2_vitl_fp16.safetensors?download=true

Place in:
ComfyUI/models/depthanything/

================================

Windows portable example root:
C:\AI\comfy\ComfyUI_windows_portable\ComfyUI\

Restart ComfyUI after copying models so they appear in loader dropdowns.

Tested on a 4090 with 24GB VRAM, 64GB of System RAM with videos of 32 seconds length at 30fps.

This workflow is really only meant for short clips so don't even think about putting a feature-length video into this! Ã¢ËœÂ Ã¯Â¸Â. 

Large and longer video clips will use up a lot of system RAM, so take this as a guide.

Depending on video resolution, it is recommended to downscale the frames for the depth maps, they are low freq. images so detail isn't important.  Best to keep videos as 1080p or lower.

720p : keep at 1.0 or downscale to 0.5
1080p : downscale to 0.5
1440p : downscale to 0.25-0.3

Batch Size:
Number of frames to process at once. Adjust according to your hardware. Default is 32.  If you run out of RAM, set to a lower value. 

When converting videos, a temp_file is created and is removed when processing is done.  This works under Linux, but under Windows, the file may still linger in C:\Users\username\AppData\Local\Temp.  You may wish to clear this out manually.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: seams, unparallel, not matching, visible mask, unpainted mask, pink, magenta, purple, vertical stripe, colored column, solid color strip, filler
To use audio conditioning, remove the bypass from these nodes and replace the empty latent with the Set Latent Noise Mask.
